summary: Regression check after `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL || ''` default change. Backend 6/6 pytest pass; frontend all API-driven flows work (blog preview loads 3 posts, /blog list, /blog/:slug detail, contact form submit shows success toast). No 4xx/5xx observed on any /api call during navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Vercel deploy note: with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL='' the frontend hits same-origin /api/*. This requires Vercel rewrites/proxy to backend or a separate deploy target; otherwise blog/contact will 404 in production. Consider setting REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL at build time on Vercel.
seed_data_creation: Contact POST created TEST_Regression / test_ui@example.com entries in Mongo (safe test data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 is a regression after env var default change. All flows green. Backend seeds 3 blog posts on startup; slug for detail test is 'aeo-geo-ai-search-optimization-guide'. Contact form testids: contact-{name,email,message}-input, contact-submit-btn.
